channel.title: Technology on Ls's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Technology on Ls's Blog

item.title: Research Draft on Cognitive Neuroscience
item.description: Functional Connectivity and its Generation Methods Reference: Richards, B. A., Lillicrap, T. P., Beaudoin, P., Bengio, Y., Bogacz, R., Christensen, A., … & Kording, K. P. (2019). A deep learning framework for neuroscience. Nature neuroscience, 22(11), 1761-1770. Liu, Y., Seguin, C., Tian, Y. E., Di Biase, M. A., & Zalesky, A. (2025). Deep generation of personalized connectomes based on individual attributes. Medical Image Analysis, 103761. To be continued… Permutation Test Moran’s Permutation Test Reference:
